name: 政治聯姻（無愛婚約）
description: 太子與霍頓小姐的婚約純粹是政治需要，女主親手促成卻內心痛苦。這條線製造了虐心感和三角關係的張力。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: Only by marrying Joyce can he stabilize the Horton family. This is his destiny. ... I thought whoever he married I wouldn't care. But now I am so jealous. I don't want any other woman touching him. I hate the idea of him holding another woman.
examples.context: 太子與霍頓小姐的婚約純粹是政治需要，女主親手促成卻內心痛苦。這條線製造了虐心感和三角關係的張力。
